- **python_314_doctrine**: Typing: Mandatory strict typing. Every public/internal function MUST have full type hints. Use pyright or mypy --strict.
- **python_314_doctrine**: Data Modeling: Prefer immutable models. Use @dataclass(frozen=True, slots=True) for nogil-ready efficiency.
- **python_314_doctrine**: Error Model: No silent failures. Custom exceptions (SAMBrainError) for domain errors. Re-raised with context (from e).
